summary: Retested the allowance persistence fix in Parent Dashboard Money & Goals tab. Allowance now posts to /parent/allowances and persists — after submission the Active Allowances section renders a card with '₹10 weekly'. Toasts 'Allowance set up!' and 'Gave ₹5 to child!' both fire correctly. Cleanup via Cancel button was performed. Fix verified.

issues: Card innerText shows only '₹10 weekly • Next:' — child name is not present as text (may be rendered only via avatar image), and 'Next:' has no date value. Consider displaying child display name and next-run date text for clarity/accessibility.

action_items: (Minor) Show child display name text and next-run date in the Active Allowances card — currently only '₹10 weekly • Next:' is textually visible.
(Minor) Add aria-describedby / DialogDescription to Send Money DialogContent — radix warns 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'.
critical_code_review_comments: Send Money DialogContent triggers a Radix a11y warning — add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby.
Active Allowances card missing child name/next date in visible text output.
seed_data_creation: Created a temporary weekly allowance for Demo Kid ₹10 and cancelled it. Sent a ₹5 gift as part of Gift regression (not cleaned — one-time transaction).
context_for_next_testing_agent: handleSetAllowance -> POST /parent/allowances is working; card renders and 'Cancel' button removes the allowance. Radix DialogDescription warning present but non-blocking.
rca of the issue: Previously the frontend posted to the one-time /parent/allowance endpoint so no recurring allowance was persisted; changing to /parent/allowances persists and lists via GET /parent/allowances.
